title: Width
text: Width The line width (where Uniface should wrap text) of a multiline Unifield. Technical Name: LINEWIDTH Expected Value: Numeric, up to 8 digits Default Value: 240 Description The default width is 240 if one or more of the following conditions is true: The field is variable-length. The field length is greater than 240 bytes. The field is drawn on the component with a vertical size of two lines or more. Applies to Field Layout Modeled Field Layout Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
